title: Book configuration
description: Contract for a book.yaml: the single file that drives a ladle build.

title.description: Cover title. The only required field.

subtitle.description: Optional tagline shown on the cover.

volume.description: Optional edition/volume label (e.g. '1.0'). String or number.

language.description: BCP-47 language tag; sets the EPUB language and PDF lang.

rights.description: Copyright/rights line shown in the footer + EPUB metadata.

content_license.description: Default per-recipe content license; recipes inherit it when they omit `license`.

repo_url.description: Project URL for the 'Contribute a recipe' link.

author.description: Optional author string for EPUB metadata (defaults to '<title> contributors').

theme.description: A bundled theme name (e.g. 'default') or a path to a book-local theme directory.

introduction.description: Path (relative to book.yaml) to the front-matter introduction page.

recipes_dir.description: Path (relative to book.yaml) to the recipe markdown files.

illustrations_dir.description: Path (relative to book.yaml) to per-recipe illustrations.

sections.description: Contents order; recipes group by their `category` front matter and appear in this order.

order.description: Explicit recipe order by slug; slugs not listed sort alphabetically within their section.

palette.description: Design-token colours overriding the theme's palette (name -> hex).

fonts.description: Font-family overrides for the theme (role -> family name).

labels.description: Optional chrome-string overrides for a non-English edition; any key omitted falls back to the English default.
